title: Question about Eva on Toonami
wikitext:
[]: Question about Eva on Toonami             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sun May 02, 2010 5:06 pm Did anyone on here actually watch the two watered down, heavily edited episodes they aired on Toonami's Giant Robot Week in Feburary 2003? I luckily miss it (thank God...) No one should have to see Misato and Pen-Pen drink...Soda. *shudder*

[]: Re: Question about Eva on Toonami             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sun May 02, 2010 5:10 pm DevRei17 wrote: Did anyone on here actually watch the two watered down, heavily edited episodes they aired on Toonami's Giant Robot Week in Feburary 2003? I luckily miss it (thank God...) No one should have to see Misato and Pen-Pen drink...Soda. *shudder*

[]: Re: Question about Eva on Toonami             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sun May 02, 2010 5:16 pm tomrule123 wrote: I never saw it, but I have heard of this matter. Good thing their second airing was much better. Have you personally seen this?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun May 02, 2010 6:06 pm I saw them. The edits didn’t really bother me. I found them to be more funny then anything else.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun May 02, 2010 6:29 pm I watched them. It wasn't much to speak of. The edit lists on Anime News Network will suffice if you missed it.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun May 02, 2010 7:17 pm I saw them. They were actually my first time watching Eva, after having heard about it for ages but not really knowing enough about it to want to spend money on it yet. I picked up the first DVD and started watching through the series pretty shortly thereafter.

[]:             Quote Post by tedness » Sun May 30, 2010 7:26 pm Saw it and glad they didn't make it a regular series. Would've gone the way of Naruto and Bleach.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Mon May 31, 2010 5:15 am I kinda want to see them just to see how bad they are for myself, having heard the changes were very bad, it'd be the can't look away from the wreckage kind of thing
